execute.stdout:
hi -> short
hello -> medium
goodmorning -> long
ok -> short

code:
import io
import string

mut done = false
while not done
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    if n == 0
      done = false
    else if n <= 3
      println("#{line} -> short")
    else if n <= 7
      println("#{line} -> medium")
    else
      println("#{line} -> long")
    end
  when None
    done = true
  end
end
